testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_02

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/buttons')' Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 8 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/autocomplete"

testcase.name: test_TC_FormSubmission_HappyPath_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('thank-you')' Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/thanks Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 15000ms 18 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/thanks"

testcase.name: test_TC_Autocomplete_AddressDetails_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to have Value '525' Actual value: Call log: - Expect "to_have_value" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator("#street_number") 14 × locator resolved to <input type="text" id="street_number" class="form-control" placeholder="Street address"/> - unexpected value ""

testcase.name: test_TC_Dropdown_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 'https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/buttons' Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/buttons# Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/buttons#"

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_4_2b0a\test_page_4_2b0a.py#x1B[0m:33: in test_TC_Dropdown_01 #x1B[0mexpect(page).to_have_url(PAGE_4_2B0A_URL)#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 'https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/buttons'#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/buttons# #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 9 × unexpected value "https://formy-project.herokuapp.com/buttons#"#x1B[0m
